PARISâCoordinated acts of sabotage that crippled Franceâs high-speed railway network just as the Olympic Games were set to begin on July 26 appear to have beenthe work of radical leftists, Interior Minister Gerald DarmaninÂ said on July 29.

No group has yet claimed responsibility for the pre-dawn attacks, whichresulted in travel chaoshours before the opening ceremony of the Olympics. No arrests have been made so far.

title: Politics taints Paris Olympics with sabotage and misinformation | The Straits Times
description: The French authorities are continuing to warn about more expansive plots to disrupt the Games. Read more at straitstimes.com.
